query:
SELECT
  'products' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  MIN(createdAt) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(createdAt) AS last_created_at
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-03'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'purchase_order_deletion_logs' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  MIN(createdAt) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(createdAt) AS last_created_at
FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-03';
